# Davide Veneto — Meta Ads Specialist

> Your advertiser sends reports. I send clients.

Davide Veneto is a Meta Ads specialist based in Asti, Italy. He works with a maximum of 3 companies at a time, delivering measurable results through data-driven advertising campaigns on Facebook and Instagram.

## Background

Former competitive powerlifter. He applies the same discipline to advertising: precise programming, measurable progression, no improvisation. Every lead is tracked, every euro is accounted for.

## Services

- Meta Ads campaign management (Facebook & Instagram)
- Lead generation funnels
- Landing page strategy and copywriting
- Ad creative development
- Contact management process optimization

## Results (verified case studies)

- **HVAC**: 100k+/month in sales generated, CPA reduced from 50 to 13 with less than 2,500 invested
- **Dentistry event**: Sold out in 13 days at 30/day budget, CPA reduced by 74%
- **Dental equipment**: 245 qualified leads at 1.47 each, 43% webinar show-up rate
- **Healthcare training**: ROAS 4x, course sold at double competitors' price
- **Windows & doors**: 45 requests in 14 days, budget halved due to excess demand

## How to work with Davide

Book a free 30-minute strategy call: https://calendly.com/davideveneto/caffe-strategico
